name: logging-jsonl-run-id-contextvar
description: All logging is single-line JSON (stdout always, plus rotating logs/bee_bug_hunter.jsonl) with run_id and flow carried by contextvars rather than threaded-through parameters — tool _run() methods are invoked by BeeAI's runtime, which doesn't allow extra args, and BeeAI's asyncio loop propagates contextvars across awaits. new_run_context(flow_name) is called once per flow run to scope everything downstream.
invariants: Every log line is one JSON object (aggregator-friendly); structured fields ride in extra={'extra_fields': ...} via the log() helper
This module deliberately replaces beeai_framework.logger, which lacks JSON output, rotation, and run correlation — revisit only if BeeAI's Logger gains structured output
contracts: new_run_context() returns a 12-hex run_id and sets run_id/flow contextvars; grep '"run_id": "<id>"' reconstructs one run end to end
